params.context: ★★★ #737 HAR SANITIZATION TASK (no Chrome navigation needed). #737 captured 41MB HAR with Entra ID tokens at C:\Users\최장희\Documents\dev_test_sync\files\737\m365_copilot_chathub_normal_session.har — push BLOCKED by GitHub secret scanning. Per dispatcher instruction options (a)+(b) [sanitization/extraction]: extract ONLY the Chathub WebSocket frames (the part we actually need for envelope schema) into a small clean JSON file safe for git push.

test_steps: 2. Parse JSON. Filter `log.entries[]` to entries where `request.url` contains 'substrate.office.com/m365Copilot/Chathub' OR is wss:// upgrade
3. For each matching entry, extract ONLY:
- request.url (sanitize: remove userid/token query params if any)
- response.content.text (KEEP — this is the envelope payload we need)
- For WS upgrades: the WebSocket frames (request._webSocketMessages array) — KEEP all frames
4. Save extracted data as JSON: files/742/chathub_envelope_extract.json (small, sanitized)
5. ALSO grep the original HAR's response content for 'Something went wrong' to identify FIX-D-4 Path B candidates → save grep matches to files/742/fallback_text_grep.json
6. ALSO list ALL HTTP endpoints (no body) called during session → files/742/endpoint_list.json (helpful for FIX-F)
7. Push files/742/* via git (should NOT contain tokens after sanitization)

result_criteria.OK_extracted: files/742/ contains chathub_envelope_extract.json + fallback_text_grep.json + endpoint_list.json, all token-free
result_criteria.FAIL_tokens_still_present: github push still blocked → need additional sanitization round
result_criteria.FAIL_no_chathub_frames: 11 chathub match lines were just URL references, no actual frame contents → need different extraction approach

notes: ★ HAR sanitization for #737. Extract only Chathub WS frames + fallback text grep + endpoint list. Strip Authorization/Cookie headers. Output 3 small clean JSON files.
